title: RLE Compressed Ring-Buffer Sensor Data Logger
description: High-endurance embedded logger sampling 4 ADC channels into a lock-free ring buffer, RLE-compressing each 252-byte raw block, appending CRC32, and writing to W25Q64 SPI flash. Compression ratio streamed to UART. Corrupt blocks detected and skipped on read-back playback.
objective: Achieve ≥3× compression on slowly-varying ADC data; validate all blocks with CRC32; sustain 100 Hz 4-channel sampling; report compression ratio at 1 Hz.
constraints: Arduino Mega; W25Q64 SPI CS=10; 4 ADC channels A0-A3; 115200 UART; 256-byte flash pages; ring buffer ISR-safe.
supporting_fact_titles: Run-Length Encoding Efficiency for Embedded Sensor Logs

element_usage_notes.RLE Encoder Software Module: Compresses 252-byte raw ADC block via rle_encode_block before CRC+flash write; reports ratio.
element_usage_notes.Lock-Free Circular Sample Buffer: ISR writes 100 Hz ADC samples; foreground drains 252-byte blocks for encoding.
element_usage_notes.W25Q64 SPI Flash Block Store: Sequential 256-byte page writes with monotonic page counter for wear-levelling.
element_usage_notes.CRC32 Block Integrity Validator: CRC32 appended per compressed block; verified on playback; corrupt blocks UART-warned and skipped.

element_interactions.description: Foreground drains ring buffer and feeds raw block to rle_encode_block.
RLE output passed to CRC32 routine for integrity annotation before flash write.
CRC-annotated compressed block written to next sequential flash page.
CRC32 validated on each block read; corrupt blocks flagged with UART warning.
